footer.tagline: Good Vibe Raves — electronic music, the best energy, good people.

hero.subtitle: VAYVE brings the electronic scene together — at open airs, raves and everywhere in between.

upcoming.title: Upcoming events
upcoming.empty: More coming soon — follow us on Instagram.

vibe.title: More than a rave
vibe.body: VAYVE is about that feeling when the beat drops and everyone moves together. We create spaces for electronic music where everyone feels welcome and can just let go.

instagram.title: Follow the vibe
instagram.body: All updates, line-ups and good vibes first on Instagram.

hero.title: Grab your ticket
hero.subtitle: Tickets for our events — right here in the shop.

tickets.fallback: Shop not loading? Open in a new tab

hero.title: All events
hero.subtitle: Open airs, raves and specials by VAYVE.

events.empty: No events planned right now. Check back soon.

hero.title: We are VAYVE
hero.subtitle: A crew that lives for electronic music and good vibes.

story.title: Why we do this
story.body1: VAYVE was born out of love for the electronic scene. We wanted events where the music is front and centre and the energy carries from the first to the last minute.
story.body2: Open air, rave or a run through the city with a DJ up front — it's always about the same thing: come together, dance and enjoy the moment.

music.title: The music
music.body: Hard House, Trance, Bounce, House — we bring the sounds and acts that set the floor on fire.

people.title: The people
people.body: Open, respectful, all in. At VAYVE everyone who brings good energy is welcome.

vibes.title: The vibes
vibes.body: We take care of sound, light and everything around it so you can just let go.

hero.title: Say hi
hero.subtitle: Booking, collab or just hi — drop us a line.
